option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/dark_blue" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- Icono BidUp --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/app_icon" android:layout_width="220dp" android:layout_height="220dp" android:layout_marginTop="30dp" android:src="@drawable/logo_bidup" android:scaleType="centerInside" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Título BidUp --> <TextView android:id="@+id/app_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textSize="60sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:fontFamily="@font/sora_bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/app_icon" />
<!-- Tagline --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tagline" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/tagline" android:textSize="20sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:letterSpacing="0.05" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/app_title" />
<!-- Container para botones --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/buttons_container" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="40dp" android:layout_marginEnd="40dp" android:layout_marginTop="80dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tagline">
<!-- Botón Iniciar Sesión --> <Button android:id="@+id/login_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="50dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="@drawable/button_orange_rounded" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" android:text="@string/login" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<!-- Botón Crear Cuenta --> <Button android:id="@+id/signup_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="50dp" android:text="@string/signup" android:textSize="18sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" android:background="@drawable/button_orange_rounded" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Enlace Invitado --> <TextView android:id="@+id/guest_login_link" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/guest_login" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/gray_text" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/buttons_container" />
<!-- Barra de Progreso --> <ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progress_bar" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="4dp" android:layout_marginBottom="40dp" android:progress="30" android:progressDrawable="@drawable/progress_bar_style" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/dark_blue" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- Icono BidUp --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/app_icon" android:layout_width="170dp" android:layout_height="170dp" android:layout_marginTop="40dp" android:src="@drawable/logo_bidup" android:scaleType="centerInside" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Título BidUp --> <TextView android:id="@+id/app_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textSize="60sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:fontFamily="@font/sora_bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/app_icon" />
<!-- Tagline --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tagline" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/tagline" android:textSize="20sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:letterSpacing="0.05" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/app_title" />
<!-- Container para botones --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/buttons_container" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="40dp" android:layout_marginEnd="40dp" android:layout_marginTop="80dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tagline">
<!-- Botón Iniciar Sesión --> <Button android:id="@+id/login_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="50dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="@drawable/button_orange_rounded" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" android:text="@string/login" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<!-- Botón Crear Cuenta --> <Button android:id="@+id/signup_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="50dp" android:text="@string/signup" android:textSize="18sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" android:background="@drawable/button_orange_rounded" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Enlace Invitado --> <TextView android:id="@+id/guest_login_link" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/guest_login" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/gray_text" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/buttons_container" />
<!-- Barra de Progreso --> <ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progress_bar" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="4dp" android:layout_marginBottom="40dp" android:progress="30" android:progressDrawable="@drawable/progress_bar_style" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/dark_blue" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- Icono BidUp --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/app_icon" android:layout_width="160dp" android:layout_height="160dp" android:layout_marginTop="40dp" android:src="@drawable/Logo_BidUp" android:scaleType="centerInside" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Título BidUp --> <TextView android:id="@+id/app_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textSize="60sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:fontFamily="@font/sora_bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/app_icon" />
<!-- Tagline --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tagline" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/tagline" android:textSize="20sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:letterSpacing="0.05" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/app_title" />
<!-- Container para botones --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/buttons_container" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="40dp" android:layout_marginEnd="40dp" android:layout_marginTop="80dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tagline">
<!-- Botón Iniciar Sesión --> <Button android:id="@+id/login_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="50dp" android:text="@string/login" android:textSize="18sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" android:background="@drawable/button_orange_rounded" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
<!-- Botón Crear Cuenta --> <Button android:id="@+id/signup_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="50dp" android:text="@string/signup" android:textSize="18sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" android:background="@drawable/button_orange_rounded" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Enlace Invitado --> <TextView android:id="@+id/guest_login_link" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/guest_login" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/gray_text" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/buttons_container" />
<!-- Barra de Progreso --> <ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progress_bar" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="4dp" android:layout_marginBottom="40dp" android:progress="30" android:progressDrawable="@drawable/progress_bar_style" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/dark_blue" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- Icono BidUp --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/app_icon" android:layout_width="160dp" android:layout_height="160dp" android:layout_marginTop="40dp" android:src="@drawable/logo_bidup" android:scaleType="centerInside" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Título BidUp --> <TextView android:id="@+id/app_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textSize="60sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:fontFamily="@font/sora_bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/app_icon" />
<!-- Tagline --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tagline" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/tagline" android:textSize="20sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:letterSpacing="0.05" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/app_title" />
<!-- Container para botones --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/buttons_container" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="40dp" android:layout_marginEnd="40dp" android:layout_marginTop="80dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tagline">
<!-- Botón Iniciar Sesión --> <Button android:id="@+id/login_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="50dp" android:text="@string/login" android:textSize="18sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" android:background="@drawable/button_orange_rounded" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
<!-- Botón Crear Cuenta --> <Button android:id="@+id/signup_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="50dp" android:text="@string/signup" android:textSize="18sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" android:background="@drawable/button_orange_rounded" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Enlace Invitado --> <TextView android:id="@+id/guest_login_link" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/guest_login" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/gray_text" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:fontFamily="@font/inter_regular" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/buttons_container" />
<!-- Barra de Progreso --> <ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progress_bar" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="4dp" android:layout_marginBottom="40dp" android:progress="30" android:progressDrawable="@drawable/progress_bar_style" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="black">#FF000000</color> <color name="white">#FFFFFFFF</color> <color name="dark_blue">#1F2849</color> <color name="orange">#F5A623</color> <color name="gray_text">#99A5B5</color> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="black">#FF000000</color> <color name="white">#FFFFFFFF</color> <color name="dark_blue">#1F2849</color> <color name="orange">#FC9905</color> <color name="gray_text">#99A5B5</color> </resources>
